description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to create a ~/.cabal directory, clear any existing store, and symlink it to /cache/store for caching. Define a single build stage. Add a job-check-upd job (allow_failure) using the image registry.gitlab.com/dxld/cabal-helper/ci:ghc-8.6.5--cabal-install-3.2.0.0--stack-2.5.1 that runs apt-get install -yy jq and then $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/ci/check-testdata.sh. Add six jobs named job-ghc8.0, job-ghc8.2, job-ghc8.4, job-ghc8.6, job-ghc8.8, and job-ghc8.10, each using their respective GHC version images (ghc-8.0.2, ghc-8.2.2, ghc-8.4.4, ghc-8.6.5, ghc-8.8.4, ghc-8.10.4) with cabal-install-3.2.0.0 and stack-2.5.1, and each runs the script $CI_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/ci/build.sh. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are defined.
